registry_meta.name: Georgia Jurisdiction Recon Registry
registry_meta.purpose: Pre-onboarding recon. Captures the components that drive onboarding cost/feasibility for GA jurisdictions BEFORE onboarding begins. NOT a jurisdiction config; an entry graduates into jurisdictions/{slug}.json only when actually onboarded.

universe.source: U.S. Census Bureau Census of Governments; ACCG; GMA/GA DCA; Carl Vinson Institute of Government (UGA); GA DOE

columbia-county-ga.name: Columbia County
notable_gaps: CCSD is a separate jurisdiction
constitutional officers not modeled as bodies
columbia-county-ga.notes: ALREADY ONBOARDED. CivicClerk OData JSON API. Source of truth = jurisdictions/columbia-county-ga.json.

grovetown-ga.name: Grovetown
notable_gaps: clerk email is a role alias, not published as plaintext on the site
grovetown-ga.notes: ALREADY ONBOARDED. 13+ yrs archived PDFs. Source of truth = jurisdictions/grovetown-ga.json.

columbia-county-school-district-ga.name: Columbia County School District
notable_gaps: agendas NOT published as documents (empty agendas page) -> OCGA 50-14-1(e)(1) finding
minutes are Google Docs; some 410-Gone dead
no emailable custodian; staff emails obfuscated
public comment only via web form (Policy BCBI)
columbia-county-school-district-ga.notes: ALREADY ONBOARDED. First school_district. Source of truth = jurisdictions/columbia-county-school-district-ga.json.

richmond-county-augusta-ga.name: Augusta-Richmond County (consolidated)
notable_gaps: consolidated city-county (Augusta + Richmond) = single general-purpose gov
ORR email obfuscated on /2982/Open-Records-Requests; phone (706) 821-4899
Augusta-Richmond also referenced an in-house 'Agenda Books Application' (WebLink) alongside Municode
richmond-county-augusta-ga.notes: Largest CSRA jurisdiction. Municode Meetings agendas + NextRequest intake. Verify exact custodian name on first onboarding pass.

mcduffie-county-thomson-ga.name: McDuffie County (Thomson)
notable_gaps: consolidated Thomson-McDuffie govt site; county+city share thomson-mcduffie.gov
ORR = County Clerk via written submission form; custodian email not surfaced
also exposes a legacy CivicPlus AgendaCenter alias
mcduffie-county-thomson-ga.notes: CivicClerk (same family as Columbia County) = LOW onboarding cost for agendas. Intake via written form.

burke-county-waynesboro-ga.name: Burke County (Waynesboro)
notable_gaps: custom .php site (manually posted PDFs) -> bespoke scrape
custodian = County Manager office, no email surfaced; phone 706-554-2324
note: a 'burkeconc.portal.civicclerk.com' result is Burke County NC (collision), NOT GA
burke-county-waynesboro-ga.notes: Custom HTML/PDF -> HIGH agenda-onboarding cost. Confirm intake + custodian email by visiting site.

lincoln-county-lincolnton-ga.name: Lincoln County (Lincolnton)
notable_gaps: consolidated county + City of Lincolnton on one site (lincolncountyga.org)
agendas/minutes location not confirmed on live site
lincoln-county-lincolnton-ga.notes: NEEDS SITE VISIT. Official site identified but platform/custodian/intake unconfirmed.

wilkes-county-washington-ga.name: Wilkes County (Washington)
notable_gaps: custom CMS with in-page meeting/agenda listing; archive depth unconfirmed
wilkes-county-washington-ga.notes: Platform looks bespoke; custodian/intake unconfirmed. Site visit needed.

jefferson-county-louisville-ga.name: Jefferson County (Louisville)
notable_gaps: CivicPlus staff directory (/directory.aspx) present but custodian email behind contact form
intake method not surfaced; phone 478-625-3332
jefferson-county-louisville-ga.notes: CivicPlus (numeric-path /XXX/, /directory.aspx, /faq.aspx) -> LOW agenda cost. Custodian email obfuscated.

hancock-county-sparta-ga.name: Hancock County (Sparta)
notable_gaps: modern custom CMS (Squarespace-style); agendas/minutes posted in-page
custodian + intake unconfirmed; phone 706.444.5746
hancock-county-sparta-ga.notes: Custom CMS -> bespoke scrape. Site confirmed live; custodian email not surfaced.

warren-county-warrenton-ga.name: Warren County (Warrenton)
notable_gaps: custom static site (.html); agendas posted 'as available'; also a legacy Weebly mirror exists
custodian + intake unconfirmed
warren-county-warrenton-ga.notes: Small rural county; custom static HTML -> HIGH agenda cost, low volume.

glascock-county-gibson-ga.name: Glascock County (Gibson)
notable_gaps: smallest GA county by population; custom CMS
custodian + intake unconfirmed
agenda publication may be sparse -> possible OMA finding
glascock-county-gibson-ga.notes: Custom site. Low volume; expect minimal online publication.

taliaferro-county-crawfordville-ga.name: Taliaferro County (Crawfordville)
notable_gaps: least-populous county east of the Mississippi; custom CMS
minutes/financials/ordinances obtained through the clerk office in person/by request
intake likely manual
taliaferro-county-crawfordville-ga.notes: Custom site; records office-mediated -> HIGH onboarding cost relative to tiny output.

fulton-county-ga.name: Fulton County
notable_gaps: Legistar for legislation/agendas (back to 1880) + Granicus for video
Clerk to the Commission (404) 612-8200; custodian email not surfaced in plaintext
fulton-county-ga.notes: Largest GA county. Legistar -> MEDIUM cost (reusable InSite/Legistar API per-tenant).

gwinnett-county-ga.name: Gwinnett County
notable_gaps: agendas/minutes via County Clerk pages on gwinnettcounty.com (custom CMS), not a named vendor portal
online open-records portal coordinated by Open Records Office
Deputy County Clerk Tammy.Gibson@gwinnettcounty.com distributes BOC agendas/minutes
gwinnett-county-ga.notes: Rare: TWO plaintext custodian emails. Custom agenda CMS -> bespoke scrape, but intake is easy (email/portal).

cobb-county-ga.name: Cobb County
notable_gaps: BOC + Zoning + Planning agendas; pre-Apr-2018 minutes on county site only
custodian email + intake method not surfaced
cobb-county-ga.notes: CivicClerk -> LOW agenda cost. Largest CivicClerk tenant in this batch.

dekalb-county-ga.name: DeKalb County
notable_gaps: department-routed open records (submit to dept holding records)
per-department custodian list on /communications/openrecords
dekalb-county-ga.notes: Legistar agendas + plaintext ORA email. Clean: MEDIUM agenda cost, EASY intake.

chatham-county-ga.name: Chatham County
notable_gaps: iQM2 (now Granicus-owned) citizens portal; agenda posted Wed before Fri meeting
custodian + intake not surfaced
Savannah city is a SEPARATE jurisdiction (CivicPlus)
chatham-county-ga.notes: iQM2/Granicus -> MEDIUM cost (distinct from Legistar; has its own API surface).

clayton-county-ga.name: Clayton County
notable_gaps: agenda prepared/published by Clerk on county site (custom CMS); no named vendor portal surfaced
Clerk (770) 473-5744; email + intake not surfaced
clayton-county-ga.notes: Platform appears custom; needs confirmation of any underlying vendor. Custodian email not surfaced.

cherokee-county-ga.name: Cherokee County
notable_gaps: Granicus ViewPublisher (video + agenda/minutes docs); 'granicus_legistar' tag denotes Granicus family - this is the Granicus media/agenda portal, not necessarily full Legistar
County Clerk prepares/distributes agendas; custodian email not surfaced
cherokee-county-ga.notes: Granicus portal -> MEDIUM cost. Confirm whether Legistar legislative module is also present.

forsyth-county-ga.name: Forsyth County
notable_gaps: also surfaces a self-hosted /meetings (PNM) document store on forsythco.com alongside CivicClerk
legacy forsyth.cc/commissioners/notices.aspx still referenced
custodian email + intake not surfaced

henry-county-ga.name: Henry County
notable_gaps: CivicClerk current; Granicus (henryga.granicus.com) used for older video archive
custodian email + intake not surfaced
Tax Collector runs a SEPARATE CivicEngage AgendaCenter (henrycountytax.com)
henry-county-ga.notes: CivicClerk -> LOW agenda cost. Migrated off Granicus video to CivicClerk.

hall-county-ga.name: Hall County
notable_gaps: CivicPlus AgendaCenter (numeric /XXXX/ paths); video on Vimeo
Commission Clerk Jennifer Rivera (770) 535-8288 ext.1; email not published in plaintext
hall-county-ga.notes: CivicPlus AgendaCenter -> LOW agenda cost. Named custodian but email obfuscated.

atlanta-ga.name: Atlanta
notable_gaps: dedicated ORR search portal (web.atlantaga.gov/orr) routes to per-department custodians
agendas link to legislation (Legistar-style backend); Municipal Clerk = legislative custodian
atlantacouncil@ is an office alias, not a personal address
atlanta-ga.notes: State capital / largest city. ORR portal + named Municipal Clerk + office-alias email.

savannah-ga.name: Savannah
notable_gaps: CivicPlus AgendaCenter (current) + legacy agenda.savannahga.gov publishing app + 2011-2017 archive
Clerk of Council = designated ORO since 2020; intake via CivicPlus FormCenter; custodian email not in plaintext
savannah-ga.notes: CivicPlus AgendaCenter -> LOW agenda cost; intake via CivicPlus FormCenter (standard).

marietta-ga.name: Marietta
notable_gaps: City Clerk is records custodian; email + intake not surfaced

decatur-ga.name: Decatur
notable_gaps: custom CMS; pre-2011 materials only via City Manager office / vault
Chief of Staff (City Clerk) Meredith Roark meredith.roark@decaturga.com also plaintext
decatur-ga.notes: Custom agenda CMS -> bespoke scrape, BUT plaintext ORR email -> EASY intake.

lawrenceville-ga.name: Lawrenceville
notable_gaps: CivicPlus AgendaCenter (current) PLUS a Municode Meetings mirror (lawrenceville-ga.municodemeetings.com, 2006-present) -> two sources, pick one
custodian email + intake not surfaced
lawrenceville-ga.notes: CivicPlus AgendaCenter -> LOW cost. Dual-platform: dedupe vs Municode mirror.

jonesboro-ga.name: Jonesboro
notable_gaps: Municode Meetings (meetings.municode.com, tenant JNSBOROGA) for agendas/minutes; attachments served from Azure gov blob
intake via NextRequest portal; City Clerk named but email not plaintext
jonesboro-ga.notes: Municode Meetings agendas + NextRequest intake (same combo as Augusta).

canton-ga.name: Canton
notable_gaps: ORR submitted to Office of City Clerk; agenda platform not yet fingerprinted
City Clerk 770-704-1507
canton-ga.notes: Plaintext City Clerk email -> EASY intake. Confirm agenda platform on site visit.

cumming-ga.name: Cumming
notable_gaps: custom CMS; council + planning agendas/minutes on separate pages
plaintext ORO email + phone 770-781-2010
cumming-ga.notes: Custom agenda CMS -> bespoke scrape, BUT plaintext ORO email -> EASY intake.

mcdonough-ga.name: McDonough
notable_gaps: custodian email + intake not surfaced

gainesville-ga.name: Gainesville
notable_gaps: custodian email + intake not surfaced
